createHousehold.pricingNote: Only one person per household needs to pay.
createHousehold.nameLabel: What should your household be called?

joinHousehold.title: Join Household

inviteMembers.description: Invite friends or family to your household.
inviteMembers.description2: Scan the QR code or share the link.
